mapper.insert: insert into family_profile (user_id, remark, status, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user, is_deleted) values (#{userId}, #{remark}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser}, #{isDeleted})
mapper.select:
select fp.id, fp.user_id as userId, u.username, u.name as name, u.phone as phone, fp.remark, fp.status, fp.create_time as createTime, fp.update_time as updateTime, fp.create_user as createUser, fp.update_user as updateUser, ( select count(1) from elderly e where e.user_id = fp.user_id and e.is_deleted = 0 ) as elderlyCount from family_profile fp left join user u on u.id = fp.user_id
fp.is_deleted = 0
and u.name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')
and u.phone like concat('%', #{phone}, '%')
and fp.status = #{status}
order by fp.create_time desc, fp.id desc

select fp.id, fp.user_id as userId, u.username, u.name as name, u.phone as phone, fp.remark, fp.status, fp.create_time as createTime, fp.update_time as updateTime, fp.create_user as createUser, fp.update_user as updateUser, ( select count(1) from elderly e where e.user_id = fp.user_id and e.is_deleted = 0 ) as elderlyCount from family_profile fp left join user u on u.id = fp.user_id where fp.id = #{id} and fp.is_deleted = 0 limit 1
select * from family_profile where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0 limit 1
select * from family_profile where user_id = #{userId} limit 1
select * from family_profile where user_id = #{userId} and is_deleted = 0 and status = 1 limit 1

select fp.id, fp.user_id as userId, u.username, u.name as name, u.phone as phone from family_profile fp left join user u on u.id = fp.user_id where fp.is_deleted = 0 and fp.status = 1 and u.role = 'FAMILY' and u.status = 1 order by u.name asc, fp.id desc

select u.id as userId, u.username, u.name, u.phone, u.status, if(fp.id is null, false, true) as bound, fp.id as boundFamilyProfileId, u.name as boundFamilyProfileName from user u left join family_profile fp on fp.user_id = u.id and fp.is_deleted = 0 where u.role = 'FAMILY' order by u.create_time desc, u.id desc
